name: HannStar Display Corporation
summary: HannStar Display Corporation researches, develops, designs, manufactures, sells, and repairs thin film transistor (TFT)-liquid crystal display (LCD) products and touch panels under the HannsG and Hannspree brands. The company also offers flat-panel displays, and CCTV and related components. Its TFT-LCD products are used in notebook computer displays, desktop computer monitors, tablets, portable DVDs, digital photo frames, PND/car displays, mobiles, and wearable products. The company operates in Mainland China, Europe, Taiwan, and internationally. HannStar Display Corporation was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
